arts.ttl: Man Utd flop Antony to rival Kylian Mbappe for La Liga award after stunning revival for £86m man
arts.sum: The Brazilian is loving life in Spain after a miserable stint in English football

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Real Madrid-Man City, PSV-Juve
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Real Madrid take on Man City, PSV take on Juventus and Paris Saint-Germain take on Brest.

arts.ttl: Haaland benched for crucial Madrid-Man City clash
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has been dropped to the bench for Manchester City's crucial Champions League playoff second-leg clash with Real Madrid on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand makes Erling Haaland prediction as Man City learn 'dangerous' Real Madrid outcome
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was only fit enough to make the bench for Manchester City in their must-win clash against Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Man City need 'perfect game' - can Guardiola find miracle in Madrid?
arts.sum: Manchester City must pull off one of the greatest results in their European history at Real Madrid to stay in the Champions League, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans take aim at Barcelona with chants ahead of Man City clash
arts.sum: Sections of the Real Madrid fanbase made use of the opportunity to take firm aim at arch rivals Barcelona on Wednesday evening. This of course comes as Real prepare for…

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland: Pep Guardiola makes huge Man City selection choice in biggest game of the season
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has made the huge call not to start Erling Haaland in Wednesday night’s Champions League decider against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer Erling Haaland injury nightmare against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland was only fit enough for the bench for the Champions League game with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Man City DROP Erling Haaland for must-win Champions League clash at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City will take on Real Madrid in their Champions League clash with Erling Haaland on the bench as Pep Guardiola takes a huge risk for their must win game

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Man City confirmed XIs: Rudiger, Haaland, Dias decisions made
arts.sum: Real Madrid vs. Man City confirmed lineups: Antonio Rudiger starts for Los Blancos, but Erling Haaland will begin as a substitute for the Citizens in tonight’s Champions League clash at the Santiago Bernabeu.
